final.sql:
SELECT 
    hd_demo_sk,
    CASE 
        WHEN cs_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'Catalog'
        WHEN ss_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'Store'
        WHEN ws_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'Web'
    END AS sales_channel,
    SUM(COALESCE(cs_ext_sales_price, ss_ext_sales_price, ws_ext_sales_price)) AS total_sales
FROM 
    household_demographics
    LEFT JOIN customer ON household_demographics.hd_demo_sk = customer.c_current_hdemo_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sa...
